data.name: Page_Subtitle
data.value: Single-key encrypted VFS — every database under one passkey-derived key. Sign in to unlock; encrypt or leave the encryption plane in one shot.

data.name: Hint_AuthForEncrypt
data.value: The VFS is currently plain. To encrypt all databases under a passkey, authenticate below first.

data.name: Hint_AuthForUnlock
data.value: The VFS is encrypted but locked. Authenticate below to unlock.

data.name: Hint_ResetWhenStuck
data.value: Can't sign in? Reset removes every database stored by this app and lets you start over.

data.name: Field_RecipientKey_Help
data.value: Paste the recipient's armored PFA PUBLIC KEY block. The block carries both the recipient's X25519 public key (32 bytes) and their WebAuthn credentialId — the guided import on the recipient side uses the credentialId to drive WebAuthn directly to the matching passkey. The export uses ECIES (X25519 + AES-256-GCM) to wrap a fresh per-export key; only the holder of the matching private key can unwrap. No secrets cross between sender and recipient.

data.name: Confirm_ImportDisk
data.value: Importing this envelope will replace every database currently in the encrypted disk AND rebind the disk to the passkey embedded in the envelope. The current passkey will no longer unlock this disk. Continue?

data.name: Hint_ImportOnLocked
data.value: Or import an encrypted-disk envelope (.eds) to replace the disk and bind it to the import's passkey — useful for restoring a backup made under a different passkey (e.g. a YubiKey).

data.name: Confirm_Reset
data.value: This removes every database this app has stored in your browser and signs you out. Encrypted content is permanently unrecoverable without a backup. Your computer's files are not affected. Continue?

data.name: Status_Encrypted
data.value: VFS encrypted; every database is now under your passkey.

data.name: Status_Decrypted
data.value: VFS decrypted; databases are stored in plain SQLite again. Revoke the passkey separately if no longer needed.

data.name: Status_Locked
data.value: VFS locked; sign in again to access your databases.

data.name: Status_Reset
data.value: All app databases removed. Sign in and Encrypt to start over.

data.name: Status_SignedOut
data.value: Signed out; pick a passkey to continue.

data.name: Status_DiskExportedForRecipient
data.value: Exported encrypted disk for recipient ({0}) as {1}.

data.name: Status_DiskImported
data.value: Disk imported; every database has been replaced with the envelope's contents.

data.name: Status_AllImported
data.value: All databases imported; the pool has been replaced with the ZIP's contents.

data.name: Confirm_ImportAllDatabases
data.value: Importing this ZIP will replace every database currently in the pool. Continue?

data.name: Confirm_ImportAllDatabases_Locked
data.value: Importing this ZIP will wipe the encrypted disk AND remove encryption — the current passkey will no longer protect any data. You can re-encrypt the disk under any new passkey afterwards. Continue?

data.name: Confirm_ImportAllDatabases_Unlocked
data.value: Importing this ZIP will replace every database currently in the encrypted pool. Encryption stays in place under the current passkey — the imported databases will be re-encrypted on write. Continue?

data.name: Error_PastedKey_BadBase64
data.value: Pasted identity is not a valid armored PFA PUBLIC KEY block.

data.name: Error_PastedKey_WrongLength
data.value: Pasted public key must be 32 bytes; got {0} bytes.

data.name: Error_PastedKey_NoCredentialId
data.value: Pasted identity is missing the WebAuthn credentialId. Ask the recipient to copy their armored identity from the Encryption page (a freshly armored block carries the credentialId automatically).

data.name: Error_ImportEnvelopeHasNoCredentialId
data.value: Picked envelope has no credentialId hint — it was produced by an older export path. Re-export from a current build.
